Id1.text: Born in Darien, Connecticut, Alfred N. Phillips, was the Mayor of Stamford Connecticut.

Id2.text: Alfred N. Phillips, Mayor of Stamford, Connecticut, was born in Darien, Connecticut.

Id3.text: Darien, Connecticut is the birthplace of Alfred N. Phillips, who was the Mayor of Stamford Connecticut.
